meaning: n.顶,尖端,梢,倾斜,轻击,末端,小费,秘密消息vt.在...顶端装附加物,使倾斜,使翻倒,暗示,轻击,给,泄露,给小费vi.倾斜,翻倒,倾覆,踮脚走,给小费n.提示,技巧
examples: Did you give the waiter a tip?
The tail tapered to a rounded tip.
He gave the waiter a generous tip.
Eventually, someone will figure out that this is just the tip of a virtual iceberg.
The BBC's Milton Nkosi in Johannesburg says Mr Frederiksen was arrested last week following a tip-off.
